allow: Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scripts/varlamore-shops.json','utf8'\)\); d.locations.forEach\(l => { console.log\(l.location, '—', l.shops.length, 'shops'\); l.shops.forEach\(s => { const t = s.stockTables[0]; console.log\('  ', s.name, '—', t?.stock?.length, 'items, cols:', t?.columns?.join\(' | '\)\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scripts/varlamore-shops.json','utf8'\)\); const s = d.locations[0].shops.find\(s => s.name === \\"The Flaming Arrow\\"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.stockTables[0].stock.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./src/data/region/regions.js'\); const all = [...r.UNIVERSAL_REGIONS, ...r.UNLOCKABLE_REGIONS]; console.log\(all.map\(r => r.name\).join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scripts/asgarnia-shops.json'\)\); const portSarim = d.regions.Asgarnia.locations.find\(l => l.location === 'Port Sarim'\); portSarim.shops.forEach\(s => console.log\(s.name + ' — ' + s.stockTables[0].stock.length + ' items'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scripts/asgarnia-shops.json'\)\); Object.values\(d.regions\)[0].locations.forEach\(l => { console.log\('\\n' + l.location + ':'\); l.shops.forEach\(s => console.log\('  ' + s.name + ' \(' + s.stockTables[0].stock.length + ' items\)'\)\); }\);")
